creator: freebsd@mnd.sc
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #14)

Unfortunately, upstream is not interested (https://rt.cpan.org/Public/Bug/Display.html?id=119227). Gentoo has noted the same problem (https://bugs.gentoo.org/show_bug.cgi?id=601774), maybe whatever fix/workaround/solution the devise could be shared?
